query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN digestSafe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS digest_safe_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN digestSafe = 0 OR digestSafe IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_digest_safe
FROM projects 
WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (suppressed IS NULL OR suppressed = 0);
